overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit downtown and industrial districts at night on rain-slicked roads. The player drives through commercial avenues, covered overpasses, construction zones, and gritty industrial areas with dynamic neon lighting and wet reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with elevated highway overpasses

events.description: approaching intersection with yellow zebra crossing
entering covered area beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through wet neon-lit streets, weaving between cars in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying red samurai imagery with japanese text
tall modern building with illuminated glass windows
elevated concrete highway structure crossing above the road
rain-slicked multi-lane road reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit commercial avenue in Night City, with massive digital billboards and glass skyscrapers lining the street. The motorcycle navigates through moderate traffic, approaching an intersection before entering the shadow of a highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered roadway beneath highway overpass with concrete pillars

events.description: entering darker underpass with reduced neon visibility and artificial lighting
stopping behind white van at red traffic light

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop behind a white van at the traffic light under the overpass

notable_agents.action: white delivery van stopped at red light ahead

entered.detail: massive concrete support column for the highway above
overhead gantry sign with white directional arrows
blue painted concrete wall with white graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath the highway overpass, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed with massive concrete pillars lining the road. The player slows to a stop behind a white delivery van at a red traffic light, surrounded by graffiti-covered walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with construction barriers and palm trees

events.description: making right turn at intersection onto new street
entering construction zone with yellow barriers lining the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating out of the underpass and executing a right turn at the intersection, entering a street lined with construction barriers

notable_agents.action: silver van driving in parallel lane alongside the motorcycle

entered.detail: temporary yellow and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the road
tall palm trees visible along the sidewalk in the distance
low-rise commercial building with pink and blue neon signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the motorcycle accelerates into a right turn at a sunlit intersection, transitioning back to the neon-lit open streets. The road is lined with yellow construction barriers and palm trees, with commercial buildings featuring bright neon signs on the right.

events.description: navigating through narrowed lanes with concrete dividers
weaving around silver van in adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: navigating through the construction zone, overtaking a silver van while avoiding concrete road dividers

notable_agents.action: silver van being overtaken on the left side

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on building facade
temporary concrete barriers separating the lanes

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle weaves through a construction-lined avenue with yellow barriers and concrete dividers narrowing the roadway. Large digital advertisement screens glow on the right while the player overtakes a silver van, navigating the constrained urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: gritty industrial district with orange sodium lighting

events.description: entering grittier industrial area with reduced neon and orange street lighting
stopping at red traffic light behind utility truck

agents.ego_description: driving through the industrial zone with orange sodium lighting and stopping at a red light behind a large truck

notable_agents.action: large utility truck stopped at red light ahead
person in blue clothing walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large industrial building with corrugated metal exterior and minimal lighting
tall electrical transmission tower with multiple cables against the night sky
street lamp casting orange glow on the wet pavement
blue neon sign with DTR lettering on industrial building

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a grittier industrial district with orange sodium street lighting replacing the neon glow. Large warehouses and power line towers dominate the skyline as the motorcycle stops at a red light behind a utility truck, with a pedestrian visible on the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial underpass with concrete structures and DTR facility

events.description: passing under industrial overpass with DTR sign visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating through industrial streets, making a right turn and passing under a heavy industrial overpass near the DTR facility

entered.detail: heavy industrial bridge structure with steel support beams crossing the road
tall weathered concrete wall lining the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment navigates through the industrial area, passing under a heavy steel overpass structure. The blue DTR neon sign becomes more prominent on the right as the motorcycle makes a right turn, with concrete retaining walls lining the street and the environment taking on a gritty, utilitarian character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the vibrant, neon-lit commercial heart of Night City into a gritty, utilitarian industrial district. It begins by navigating a wet avenue lined with massive digital billboards and glass skyscrapers before diving into the oppressive shadow of a concrete highway overpass. As the motorcycle exits the underpass and makes a right turn, the scene shifts back to open streets characterized by yellow construction barriers, palm trees, and glowing advertisement screens. The environment then transitions from the colorful neon glow to the orange sodium lighting of an industrial zone dominated by warehouses and power line towers. Finally, the camera passes under a heavy steel structure and turns right past a prominent blue DTR sign, moving along concrete retaining walls into a stark, industrial landscape.
